entry.title: New: Bill 190 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, INCREASING ESTIMATED REVENUES, CARRYOVER/SAVINGS, GENERAL FUND BY $800,000, CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF POLICE, COUNTYWIDE, INCREASE APPROPRIATION FOR COUNTYWIDE POLICE FACILITIES IN THE AMOUNT OF $800,000, APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF POLICE, INCREASE APPROPRIATION FOR COUNTYWIDE, COUNTYWIDE POLICE FACILITIES IN THE AMOUNT OF $800,000"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
